title: Set dropdown column value automatically oppun status change
excerpt: It would be great to have the possibility to automatically fill dropdowns and tags based on a status change!

posts.author: Ozi (Oz Israel)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be great to have the possibility to automatically fill dropdowns and tags based on a status change!

posts.author: Liorpeer (lior peer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Any solutions for that yet??

I was trying to automate as well but no luck

posts.author: kbarber (Katie)
posts.cookedHtml: Jumping in on this request. We want to do it based on other fields, but having dropdown selection as one of the actions in an automation would be fantastic!

posts.author: nimamu (nimamu)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi any update on this? very needed!

posts.author: mmindling (Madeleine Mindling)
posts.cookedHtml: This would be very helpful for us as well!
